productTitle: Ubiquiti airFiber X 5 GHz, 23 dBi, Slant 45
name: Ubiquiti airFiber X 5 GHz, 23 dBi, Slant 45
title: Ubiquiti airFiber X 5 GHz, 23 dBi, Slant 45
short_description: 5GHz 23dBi Parabolic Dish Antenna, 10° Beamwidth, Dual Linear Polarization, (2) RP-SMA Female Connectors
description: The AirFiber 5G23-S45, is a sophisticated, high-performance sector antenna designed by Ubiquiti Networks. This model is part of Ubiquiti's esteemed AirFiber series, which is celebrated for pushing the boundaries of wireless network technology by offering unparalleled performance, range, and bandwidth capabilities. The AF-5G23-S45 is specifically engineered to meet the demanding needs of modern wireless networks, providing an optimal solution for high-capacity, long-distance, point-to-multipoint (PtMP) applications.

detailed_description.heading: Compatible with airFiber X radios
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 5G23-S45, is a sophisticated, high-performance sector antenna designed by Ubiquiti Networks. This model is part of Ubiquiti's esteemed AirFiber series, which is celebrated for pushing the boundaries of wireless network technology by offering unparalleled performance, range, and bandwidth capabilities. The AF-5G23-S45 is specifically engineered to meet the demanding needs of modern wireless networks, providing an optimal solution for high-capacity, long-distance, point-to-multipoint (PtMP) applications.

detailed_description.heading: Integration with AirFiber X Radio
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 5G23-S45 antenna from Ubiquiti is designed to be used in conjunction with an AirFiber X radio from the same brand. It cannot operate on its own as it is a directional antenna that requires a radio unit to transmit and receive signals.

detailed_description.heading: RF Engineering and Performance
detailed_description.text: Crafted with precision and utilizing advanced RF engineering, the AirFiber 5G23-S45 boasts a 23dBi gain, making it highly efficient in focusing the radio signal and enhancing the overall link quality and performance. This sector antenna operates in the 5 GHz frequency band, optimizing its use for applications that require high throughput and minimal interference. The integration of Slant 45 technology in the AF-5G23-S45 is a critical feature, as it employs dual-polarity (±45 degrees slant) configuration, which significantly improves signal penetration, reduces interference, and increases multipath performance. This configuration is especially beneficial in dense environments where signal quality can often be compromised.

detailed_description.heading: Durability and Reliability
detailed_description.text: The design of the AF-5G23-S45 reflects Ubiquiti Networks' commitment to durability and reliability. The antenna is constructed with high-quality materials that are weather-resistant, ensuring it can withstand harsh environmental conditions such as rain, wind, and sun exposure. This resilience is paramount for maintaining consistent performance and long-term reliability of the wireless network infrastructure, particularly in outdoor deployments.

detailed_description.heading: Installation and Flexibility
detailed_description.text: Ubiquiti Networks has engineered the AF-5G23-S45 with ease of installation and flexibility in mind. The antenna features a versatile mounting system, allowing for quick and secure installation on a variety of structures. This design consideration not only simplifies the deployment process but also enables precise alignment and positioning of the antenna to optimize coverage and connectivity. The mounting system is complemented by an intuitive design that facilitates seamless integration with AirFiber and other compatible Ubiquiti radios, providing network operators with a highly adaptable solution that can be tailored to meet specific network requirements.
